title: oncocalyx kelleri
intro: Oncocalyx kelleri, also known as Keller's oncocalyx, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oncocalyx kelleri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Oncocalyx kelleri typically involve drying and processing the leaves and roots to create teas, infusions, or decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
